subcodes.title: Words to Ida Finch and Fanny and Alma Knobloch, spoken on 1908-11-08
subcodes.first_line: You are not accustomed to Persian food. America and Europe are like unto the dawn of the sun of reality, just at the beginning of the morning.
subcodes.subjects: @bringing forth results; fruit, @growth of the Cause, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @high station of learning
